content: 2026 free-tier hosting comparison for static+serverless apps: Cloudflare Pages (unlimited bandwidth, 500 builds/mo, Workers Functions 100K req/day free, commercial use allowed) is most generous; Netlify free (100GB bandwidth, 300 build min/mo, 125K function invocations/mo, commercial use allowed); Vercel Hobby (100GB bandwidth, functions capped, hobby/non-commercial ToS only). For a stateless static+optional-serverless weather dashboard, Cloudflare Pages or Netlify are preferred over Vercel due to commercial-use terms and more generous limits.
